title: Colony Authority
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Colony Authority''' was an agency closely related to, but officially separate from, the [[Bureau of Scouting and Exploration Services|New Republic Scout Service]]. It founded and supported new colonies established on recently-discovered [[Planet/Legends|planets]]. As a result, it worked closely with the [[Republic Scout Service/Legends|Scout Service]], which often assisted the Authority.

The Colony Authority also paid out bonuses to [[Scout/Legends|scouts]] who discovered habitable worlds or new [[Species/Legends|species]] willing to join the [[New Republic/Legends|New Repubilc]]. These bonuses started at 1,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] and could get as high as .005% of the planet's net worth—but the largest bonuses were almost never paid out in full by the cash-strapped New Republic, and were instead doled out as monthly installments of 1,000 credits.

Members of the Colony Authority exhibited a competitive streak toward the Scout Service (and vice versa).

==Sources==
*<!-- 1993-03-XX -->''[[Galaxy Guide 8: Scouts]]''
